refnamediv.refpurpose: Selects a session to use with scarecrow-session

refsect1.title: Description
refsect1.para: scarecrow-session-selector can be used from a xsession desktop file to select a session before scarecrow-session is run. scarecrow-session reads and stores its session in the $XDG_DATA_HOME/scarecrow-session/saved-session directory. scarecrow-session-selector works by replacing the saved-session directory by a symlink to another directory. Since the session name is used as the directory name, it may not contain '/' characters or begin with a '.'.
When a session name is specified, scarecrow-session-selector will create a symlink to select this session.
When started without arguments, scarecrow-session-selector will present a dialog that allows to choose one of the existing sessions or create a new one.
